allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=json.load\(open\(''stinett.geojson''\)\); print\(f''Total features: {len\(f[""features""]\)}''\); print\(f''Sample feature properties: {list\(f[""features""][0][""properties""].keys\(\)\)}''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=json.load\(open\(''stinett.geojson''\)\); geom=f[''features''][0][''geometry'']; print\(f''Geometry type: {geom[""type""]}''\); print\(f''Coordinates count: {len\(geom[""coordinates""]\)}''\)")
